text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm meandering about the academy on my day
off, until Matikanefukukitaru comes charging
right at me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I finally found you, Trainer! Oh, I'm so glad to see
you're all right!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to talk! I have to get you
somewhere safe right away! Quick, follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to grasp the pandemonium at hand, I find
myself being dragged to the nearest train
station...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Great, the train's about to arrive! Don't
you worry, we're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, sorry! I completely forgot to give you
an explanation!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Try to stay calm, okay? It's about your
horoscope. Today, you have...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Super-ultra-mega misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But don't you fret! I came running to give you this
high-powered good-luck charm—strong against
the most dastardly of calamities!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I will protect you with my lucky powers, even from
the great misfortune that lingers over you as we
speak!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So please don't leave my side! If you do, lightning
might strike from above, or the ground might split
open and swallow you whole!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's dead serious. She sticks close to me like a
bodyguard, even while we're on the move.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I was just getting to that. You see, this
town has a shrine that is renowned all throughout
the country!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's also one of Japan's preeminent sacred sites!
I'm sure a place like this will wipe you clean of
bad luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We should go pray! Oh, or we could set you up
with another good-luck charm!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right! The best thing to do here is to ask the gods
for help!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Operation Bad Luck Break is underway! Ahem...
Rovah, rivah, vah vuu vee... Let us reach our goal
safely...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, we've come to the shrine on a holiday.
There are many more visitors than expected, and
I lose sight of Matikanefukukitaru before I realize
it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whew! What a crowd today! But don't worry,
we're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? T-Trainer? Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm more likely to walk right by her than anything
else if I go looking, so I stay where I am until
Matikanefukukitaru calls me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay, Trainer?! I'm so sorry! I promised to
protect you and look what happened!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not giving up! I'll definitely find you, so
just sit tight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never heard Matikanefukukitaru sound so
determined before... It's unlike her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No misfortune will bring harm to my trainer—not
on my watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide not to mention that I can see her about
thirty meters away yelling into her phone.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Hello?! Are you there?! Say something!
Speak to me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm coming to get you right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she asked me to, I sit tight until finds me...
about fifteen minutes later.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Thank goodness! Oh, praise be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I share a touching (?)
moment, reunited at last.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I was really getting worried for a minute
there, but it looks like we got our prayers in just
fine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With this, you're now safe and sound! After all, I
prayed super hard for you to be protected for all
eternity!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Wait!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you think asking for such a huge favor in one
go is a bit too much?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I better add in an extra offering, to be safe... Let
me go buy a good-luck charm real quick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we leave lugging bags chock full of
good-luck charms.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's good to have luck as your shield! Let's get
moving!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it ain't Fukukitaru! Fancy meetin' you
here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gyahhhhh! Taiki and Suzuka! What are you two
doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We're here sightseeing... We were just about to
look for some souvenirs.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and your trainer's here too! Lemme pop on
over for some proper greetin's!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
W-wait just a second! Don't come anywhere near
my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huh, but why?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just don't! I've got to be the one by my trainer's
side!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, that shouldn't be a problem! Now that we're
all here, I reckon we can just go as a group!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That won't do! Today is... It's just... I have to be
with my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And it has to be just the two of us, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... I don't quite get it, but maybe it's best not
to get in her way, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It might be that they have some important
matters to discuss. I think we'd better leave them
alone, at any rate.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Important matters? Alone...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! I'm pickin' up what you're puttin' down!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry 'bout that! We didn't mean to interrupt
anything! Go and have yourselves a lovely day, ya
hear? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling there's a bit of a
misunderstanding at hand, but
Matikanefukukitaru breathes a sigh of relief as
they walk away.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That was close! Any closer and you would've
infected them with your bad luck, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If that happened, you would've become known as
the unlucky trainer of death—exiled from the
racing world...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry and buy ourselves a lucky charm
before anything else happens!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll pick the best of the bunch! Don't worry, you're
in good hands!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's words sound reassuring
enough, but when we arrive at the counter...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow! There are so many ultra-rare charms
here! Just look at 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up buying up every last one we can get
our hands on.
